nl_query: For each board in EVAL_IN_PROGRESS status, show the course code, total scripts, number of scripts in each evaluation status, the board coordinator name and honorarium weight, and the number of calendar days remaining until the deadline.
failed_sql: SELECT au.code AS academic_unit_code, COUNT(a.id) AS total_scripts, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_not_assigned, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'ASSIGNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_assigned, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_in_progress, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'FROZEN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_frozen, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'SUBMITTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_submitted, bc.name AS board_coordinator_name, bc.honorarium_weight AS honorarium_weight, (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (b.deadline - CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)) / 86400) AS days_remaining_until_deadline FROM academic_unit au JOIN board b ON au.id = b.course_id JOIN answer_script a ON b.id = a.course_id AND b.exam_id = a.exam_id LEFT JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON a.id = ea.script_id LEFT JOIN faculty_cache bc ON bc.employee_id = b.board_coordinator_id WHERE b.status = 'EVAL_IN_PROGRESS' GROUP BY au.code, bc.name, bc.honorarium_weight, b.deadline ORDER BY au.code;
error: Validation failed (schema): Invalid value: evaluation_attempt.status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED' is not a valid value for this column. Allowed values: ASSIGNED, FROZEN, IN_PROGRESS, SUBMITTED. Tip — this column is constrained to a fixed set of values by a CHECK constraint; only the listed values can ever exist in the data.
